title: amaryllis × coccinea
intro: Amaryllis × coccinea, also known as the Scarlet Lilyturf or Red Lilyturf, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family, derived from the combination of Asphodelus cerasiferus and Amaryllis clivorum. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Amaryllis × coccinea include its ability to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its high concentration of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic compounds. Herbal preparations of Amaryllis × coccinea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
